title: Senior Doctor - Sahyadri Hospitals - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Sahyadri Hospitals - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Sahyadri Hospitals, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sahyadri Hospitals:
Sahyadri Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
